response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A. No reference lyrics were provided as there is no vocal music. 2. JSON Usage: Fully manual transcription of the VTuber's gaming commentary was done. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to match the exact duration of spoken words. A background speaker's dialogue is also transcribed.
